turns.prompt: A novel virus is spreading fast. Hospitals warn of collapse within weeks. The country waits for your move.

choices.label: Order an immediate national lockdown
choices.flavour: Stop the spread. Stop the economy.

delayed.headline: Shuttered small businesses start to fail in waves

choices.reaction: Streets empty overnight. The economy holds its breath.

choices.label: Targeted distancing, keep the economy open
choices.flavour: Thread the needle. Hope it holds.
choices.reaction: Shops stay open. So does the virus.

choices.label: Issue guidance and trust citizens to act

turns.prompt: The first wave eases. For a moment, it feels survivable.

choices.label: Surge funding into hospitals and testing
choices.flavour: Build the capacity you wished you had.
choices.reaction: ICU capacity doubles. The deficit notices.

choices.label: Reopen everything to revive the economy
choices.flavour: The tills have been silent too long.

delayed.headline: A second wave arrives, larger than the first

choices.label: Pour money into a vaccine programme
choices.flavour: Buy your way out of the cycle.
choices.reaction: Labs race against the clock. Markets stay skeptical.

turns.prompt: A new variant emerges. Public patience is fraying and the rules are getting harder to enforce.

choices.label: Mandate vaccination for public life
choices.flavour: Protect the many. Corner the few.
choices.reaction: Uptake jumps. Protesters fill the squares.

choices.label: Borrow to pay people to stay home
Lift the rules and accept the wave
choices.flavour: The cure is costing more than the disease.

turns.prompt: The bills and the bodies from your earlier choices arrive in the same week.

memory_callbacks.text: The fast reopening seeded the wave now overwhelming the wards.
Letting it run filled exactly the hospitals you were warned about.
The long lockdown's economic scars have hardened into something structural.
The money you borrowed to keep people home is now crushing the budget.

choices.label: Ration scarce care by clinical need
choices.flavour: Decide who waits. Live with it.
choices.reaction: Doctors decide who waits. Families rage at the gates.

choices.label: Borrow heavily to build capacity overnight
choices.reaction: Field hospitals rise in car parks. So does the debt.

choices.label: Shield the vulnerable, free everyone else
choices.reaction: Most return to normal. The isolated pay the price.

turns.prompt: The pandemic recedes at last. What kind of society did it leave behind?

choices.label: Rebuild around public health and equity
choices.reaction: A stronger safety net. A heavier ledger.

choices.label: Unleash growth to pay it all back
choices.reaction: The recovery roars. Not everyone is invited to it.

choices.label: Roll back every emergency power
choices.reaction: Freedoms return in full. So does a little chaos.
